created.description: Timestamp when the trusted origin was created

createdBy.description: The ID of the user who created the trusted origin

id.description: Unique identifier for the trusted origin

lastUpdated.description: Timestamp when the trusted origin was last updated

lastUpdatedBy.description: The ID of the user who last updated the trusted origin

name.description: Unique name for the trusted origin

origin.description: Unique origin URL for the trusted origin. The supported schemes for this attribute are HTTP, HTTPS, FTP, Ionic 2, and Capacitor.

scopes.description: Array of scope types that this trusted origin is used for

allowedOktaApps.description: The allowed Okta apps for the trusted origin scope

type.description: The scope type. Supported values: When you use `IFRAME_EMBED` as the scope type, leave the `allowedOktaApps` property empty to allow iFrame embedding of only Okta sign-in pages. Include `OKTA_ENDUSER` as a value for the `allowedOktaApps` property to allow iFrame embedding of both Okta sign-in pages and the Okta End-User Dashboard.

_links.description: Specifies link relations (see [Web Linking](https://www.rfc-editor.org/rfc/rfc8288)) available using the [JSON Hypertext Application Language](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/draft-kelly-json-hal-06) specification. This object is used for dynamic discovery of related resources and lifecycle operations.

hints.description: Describes allowed HTTP verbs for the `href`

templated.description: Indicates whether the link object's `href` property is a URI template.

type.description: The media type of the link. If omitted, it is implicitly `application/json`.

hints.description: Describes allowed HTTP verbs for the `href`

templated.description: Indicates whether the link object's `href` property is a URI template.

type.description: The media type of the link. If omitted, it is implicitly `application/json`.
